payload.title: Audit effects implementation honestly
payload.description: Write up what crates/rustricted-effects/ actually does today: intra-procedural simple-name lookup, tiny std seed table (println/eprintln/read_to_string/etc.), no trait dispatch, no closures, no aliases, no async/panic/unsafe inference, no propagation from upstream metadata. Goal is a one-pager that turns 'effects exist' into a precise list of what is and isn't implemented — so the invest-or-kill decision in RT-10 has data to lean on.
